race.comment: Former Victorian FALCON OF MALTA (3) when having the first run for the new stable and will have come on with that run now in the locker. Steps up to the mile journey now and will find this easier than what he faced down south. Sure to prove tough to hold out. CAST PARTY (11) strips fitter third-up from the spell and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Definite top three candidate. SWEET PROPOSAL (5) saves her best form for this distance range and gets some weight off with the 2kg claim. In the mix. POCKETMONEY (9) will be better for two runs back and may earn some minor money. JUNE (10) is usually thereabouts and looks one for the multiples.
